The question is asking about two individuals who held the same role (clerk) during the same year. Since each row represents an individual clerk with their start and finish years, we need to identify if there were clerks who worked during overlapping years. We can examine the "started" and "finished" columns to determine overlapping years. Although grouping isn't strictly necessary here, we could use f_group_column(started) or f_group_column(finished) to check for common years.
The two individuals, Kenneth W. Dam and Alan C. Kohn, both started their role as clerks in the year 1957. Therefore, the year in question is 1957.
